transcript:
Speaker A (AI): कल कहाँ गए थे? [Where did you go yesterday?] 
Speaker B (Human): I went to माल yesterday. 
Speaker A (AI): माल? Pronunciation थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. कल क्या खाया? [Mall? Pronunciation is a bit off. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. What did you eat yesterday?] 
Speaker B (Human): I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat pizza.] 
Speaker A (AI): पीजा? नहीं, Pizza. और बात कल की है इसलिए eat नहीं, ate. I ate pizza. ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Pizza? No, Pizza. And since it's about yesterday, not eat, but ate. I ate pizza. Where do you catch the train from?] 
Speaker B (Human): I pick train from railway इस्टेशन। [I pick train from railway station.] 
Speaker A (AI): Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। Train उठाओगे? Catch मतलब पकड़ना। और इस्टेशन नहीं, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not 'istation', Station. I catch the train from the railway station.] 
Speaker B (Human): ओहो, मेरा pronunciation weak है। [Oh, my pronunciation is weak.] 
Speaker A (AI): कोई बात नहीं, AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem, did you try the AI Teacher?] 
Speaker B (Human): वो महंगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?] 
Speaker A (AI): बिल्कुल नहीं, normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all, it is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.] 
Speaker B (Human): लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] 
Speaker A (AI): रोज़ सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे confident हो जाओगे। [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. Gradually you will become confident.] 
Speaker B (Human): वाओ, कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?] 
Speaker A (AI): नीचे install का बटन दबाओ, MySivi app install करो, sign up करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में improvement दिखने लगेगा। Trial सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days. Start now.]
on_screen_text: कल कहाँ गए थे. [Where did you go yesterday.] I went to माल yesterday. pronunciation. It is Mall, I went to the mall yesterday. कल क्या खाया [What did you eat yesterday] I eat पीजा खाया [I eat pizza] पीजा? [Pizza?] नहीं Pizza or [No Pizza or] बात कल की है इसलिए [Since it is about yesterday] eat नहीं ate - [not eat, ate -] I ate pizza. ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Where do you catch the train from?] I pick train from railway इस्टेशन [I pick train from railway station] Pick मतलब उठाना... [Pick means to lift...] train उठाओगे? [will you lift the train?] Catch मतलब पकड़ना [Catch means to catch] और इस्टेशन नहीं [and not istation] Station. I catch the train from the railway station. ओहो मेरा प्रोनाउंसिएशन वीक है [Oh my pronunciation is weak] कोई बात नहीं, [No problem,] AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [did you try AI Teacher?] वो महंगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?] बिल्कुल नहीं, [Not at all,] Normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है [7 times cheaper than normal English classes] इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi कर रहे हैं [That's why 50 lakh people are doing MySivi] लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता, [But I don't get time,] रोज सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough] धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे. [Gradually you will become confident.] वाओ [Wow] कैसे ज्वाइन करूं? [How do I join?] नीचे Install का button दबाओ, [Press the Install button below,] MySivi app install करो, sign up करो और practice शुरू करो। [Install MySivi app, sign up and start practicing.] सिर्फ 15 दिनों में improvement दिखने लगेगा [You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days] Trial सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [Trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days. Start now.]
summary: A woman practices English via a video call with an AI robot avatar that corrects her pronunciation and grammar. The AI recommends the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily practice tool. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app for a 3-day trial costing ₹1.
